about.title: About
about.author: Author: {author}
about.disclaimer: Unofficial Telegram client. Not affiliated with Telegram FZ-LLC.
about.signature_note: Built without a commercial Windows code-signing certificate — SmartScreen may ask for confirmation on first launch.

main.subtitle: Search posts by hashtag and download media from public channels

status.crash: ⚠ Previous run crashed — see yellow panel above

hint.collapsible: Sections with ▶/▼ in the header can be collapsed — click the block header.

auth.reset_session_tip: Removes saved Telegram login. You will need to sign in again by phone or QR.
auth.hint: Sign in by phone or QR. The code arrives in the «Telegram» chat inside the app.
auth.required_body: Sign in to Telegram on the Home tab first («Sign in to Telegram» or QR).

template.label: Template
template.hint: A template saves all search fields (hashtags, channels, dates, limit, media types).

dialog.name: Template name:
dialog.overwrite_body:
Template «{name}» already exists.
Replace it with current settings?

warn.select_first: Select a template in the list first.

queue.tip: Hashtags download in order with the same filters. Reorder with «Up» and «Down».
queue.download_tip: Download all queued hashtags sequentially with current filters.
queue.hint: Queue is independent of «More hashtags» — for batch download from a list.

warn.no_hashtag: Enter a hashtag in the search field first.
warn.select: Select a hashtag in the list.

dialog.clear_body: Remove all hashtags from the queue?

error.empty: Add at least one hashtag to the queue.

action.download_once_tip: Search and download. Already downloaded items (journal and files on disk) are skipped.
action.preview_tip: Thumbnail window first — select what to download, then download only selected items.
action.verify_tip: Same search without downloading: checks that files on disk match found posts.
action.reset_journal_tip: Clears the download journal for this session — files in the download folder are untouched. On next download the app will re-scan disk.

filter.date_hint: Date filter activates only after picking a date in the calendar (✕ on the field clears it).
filter.date_active: ⚠ Date filter active: {range} — posts outside the range won't be included
filter.channel_hint: @username — search within channel (empty = all Telegram channels)
filter.max_media_tip: Media file limit per run. Change only with arrows or keyboard input.
filter.max_media_hint: Limit on number of media files in results.
filter.sequential_preview_tip: View large results in batches: index once, then preview in chunks without holding the full list in memory.
filter.batch_size_tip: How many thumbnails to show at once in step-by-step preview (after downloading selected — next batch).
filter.sequential_hint: Step mode: downloaded selected from batch → next N thumbnails.
filter.extra_filters_tip: More hashtags, required/excluded tags, channels and media types
filter.extra_hashtags_hint: comma-separated — separate search per tag, own folder; paste a list or drag .txt
filter.required_hint: at least one from the list — posts without them are skipped
filter.exclude_hint: comma-separated hashtags — posts containing them are skipped
filter.extra_channels_hint: comma-separated — batch: each hashtag × each channel; paste a list or drag .txt

prefs.remember_form: Remember search form on exit (hashtag, filters, limit)
prefs.remember_form_hint: If off — search fields are empty on next launch (templates can still be picked manually).

settings.api_hint: Get at my.telegram.org → API development tools
settings.page_limit_hint: Telegram technical limit per search request (usually 50).
settings.proxy_hint: Usually: 127.0.0.1:1080 or your VPN client port.
settings.folder_by_month: Subfolder by month — channel/2026-06/ (not by day; old files are still found)
settings.download_threads_tip: Parallel file downloads (1–3). More than 3 not recommended — Telegram may rate-limit.
settings.performance_hint: Preview — thumbnails in preview window. Download — parallel downloads in one async thread.
settings.notify_hint: Notification appears in the bottom-right corner even when the window is minimized.
settings.autosave_hint: Settings are saved automatically on exit and before starting tasks.

dump.warn_no_form: Dump has no saved search form.
dump.warn_parse_failed: Failed to parse form from dump.
dump.info_restored_body:
Search fields filled from dump.
Check settings and start the task manually if needed.

log.clear_tip: Clears text only in this window; app.log on disk is unchanged

error.title: Error
error.no_hashtag: Enter a hashtag on the «Home» tab.

notify.return: You can return to the app.

flood.message: {action} — Telegram rate-limited requests (FloodWait). Resuming in {sec} sec.

exit.login_body: Telegram sign-in in progress. Abort and exit?
exit.worker_body:
Task still running. Stop and exit?

Closing via Task Manager without confirmation will be recorded as a crash.

nav.jump_tip: Enter page number and press Enter or «Go»

select.shown_tip: Select only cards from current «Shown» list (channel and filter applied).
select.none_shown_tip: Deselect only shown cards. Other channels are unaffected.
select.channel_tip: Select all posts of chosen channel even when «All channels» is shown.

deselect.on_disk_tip: Deselect all cards already on disk (entire list).

prep.done: Preview: {posts} posts · {albums} albums · {cards} media files ready
prep.progress: Preview: {posts} posts · {albums} albums · collected {ready}/{total} media files

legend.text: Legend: green border = already on disk, yellow-orange border = partially on disk, purple badge = duplicate.

original.photos_only: Original view available only for photos
original.load_failed: Failed to load original from Telegram servers
original.not_returned: Telegram did not return file ({label}) for post {id}

hint.loading: Cards are loading — you can select ready ones.
hint.click: Click card or checkbox to select/deselect.
hint.paused: Collected: {total}. Loading paused — click «Resume» to load cards and thumbnails again.
hint.streaming: Media files collected: {total}. List is growing — select ready cards.
hint.found: Found: {total}. Click card or checkbox to select/deselect.

preview.placeholder: Will appear here as they are collected…

welcome.title: Welcome

language.title: Language and appearance
language.body: Choose the interface language and theme for the wizard and the main window.
language.hint: You can keep «System default» or pin Russian/English right away. Enable dark theme now or later from the main window header.

api.title: Telegram API keys
api.link: Get keys at my.telegram.org (API development tools section).
api.hint: Create an app (any name) and copy API ID and API Hash.

error.id_not_number: API ID must be a number — as on my.telegram.org.
error.id_positive: API ID must be a positive number.
error.hash_short: API Hash too short — copy it in full from my.telegram.org.
error.save_failed: Failed to save API keys in settings.

proxy.title: Proxy
proxy.body:
By default the app uses your computer's internet.
Enable proxy only if Telegram won't connect without it. Otherwise click «Skip».

error.port_number: Proxy port must be a number.

status.need_api: Enter API ID and API Hash on the previous step first.
status.ok_proxy: Proxy works — connected to Telegram successfully.

login.title: Sign in to Telegram
login.hint:
We recommend QR sign-in — a separate window will open, scan the code in Telegram.
For phone sign-in the code arrives in the «Telegram» chat inside the app.
«Next» is enabled after successful sign-in.
login.cancelled: Sign-in cancelled — you can try again

download.title: Download folder
download.hint: Default: data/downloads in the app folder. Cloud folders (OneDrive etc.) may slow downloads.

finish.title: Done
finish.body:
On the Home tab set a hashtag, adjust filters if needed (dates, channels, media types), then click «Preview» or «Download once».

In Settings — request limits, filenames and other options. Proxy can be changed there too.
finish.notify: Show Windows notifications when tasks finish
finish.autotune: Run performance check after closing the wizard

close.title: Close wizard?
close.login_body:
Telegram sign-in in progress.
Close setup wizard?

closed.title: Wizard closed
closed.body:
Setup can be done manually:
• Settings tab — API, proxy and download folder;
• Home tab — Telegram sign-in and hashtag search.

You can reopen the wizard with «Setup wizard…» in Settings.
On next launch the wizard opens again until you complete it.

reason.sequential_faster: Sequential preview was measurably faster on the synthetic preview workload.
reason.regular_competitive: Regular preview stayed competitive, so sequential preview is not forced.
reason.download_workers_best: Download workers {n} performed best on the local synthetic download scenario.
reason.download_single_best: Single download worker stayed safest and fastest on this machine.
reason.batch_size_best: Recommended preview batch size is {n} based on sequential preview latency.

error.api_missing: Fill in API ID and API Hash in Settings
error.not_logged_in: Sign-in failed — phone number and Telegram code required

hint.done: Signed in. You can enter a hashtag and download.
hint.connected_not_logged: Connected but not signed in. Click «Sign in to Telegram» or «Sign in with QR».
hint.no_connection: No connection to Telegram servers. Try «Reset session» → «Sign in to Telegram».
hint.need_login: Click «Sign in to Telegram» or «Sign in with QR». Phone sign-in needs a code from the «Telegram» chat in the app.

reset.title: Reset session
reset.body:
Delete saved Telegram session?

You will need to sign in again with phone and code.

journal.reset_body:
Delete all download journals for this session?

(all hashtags: *_state.json)
Files in the download folder are not deleted.
journal.reset_info: On next download the app will check disk and download only what's missing.

login.connection_failed: Failed to connect to account server: {exc}

step1.title: Sign in to Telegram — step 1/3
step1.prompt:
Enter phone number in international format:
+79001234567

2fa.title: Sign in to Telegram — 2FA
2fa.prompt:
Two-factor authentication is enabled.
Enter cloud password:
2fa.invalid:
Wrong cloud password.
Enter password again:

code.app:
A {length}-digit code was sent to the Telegram app.

Where to look:
• Telegram Desktop — «Telegram» chat (service messages)
• On phone — «Telegram» chat, not regular dialogs

This is not SMS. Check all devices where you're signed in to Telegram.
code.sms:
A {length}-digit code was sent via SMS to your number.
Check phone messages (not Telegram chats).
code.call:
A {length}-digit code will be dictated by phone call.
Answer the incoming call.
code.missed_call:
Code will arrive via missed call.
Check the last digits of the caller number{pattern}.
code.other:
Code sent via {type}.
Check Telegram and SMS on your phone.

auth.migration:
Failed to connect to your account's DC{dc} server.
Try «Reset session» and sign in again.
If that doesn't help — temporarily disable Cloudflare WARP during sign-in.

error.need_login: Click «Sign in to Telegram» on the Home tab first.

preview.empty_body:
No posts found or none passed media filters.
Check hashtag, channel and media types on the «Home» tab.

summary.duplicates: Same content: {n} (file already exists, not saved again)
summary.shortfall: Not received: {n} files (Telegram didn't deliver or download failed)
summary.all_done: Everything already downloaded — no new publications.

integrity.title: Integrity check
integrity.albums_collapsed: Collapsed in results: {n} (same album repeats — Telegram returns each photo as a separate post)
integrity.dedup: · hash duplicates: {n} (different posts reference one file)
integrity.extra: Extra files in folder (no post in selection): {n}

dir.not_folder: The specified path is not a folder.

errors.flood_wait: Telegram asks to wait {sec} sec. (too many requests). Waiting will start automatically.
errors.channel_private: Channel is private or unavailable. Check @username and channel access.
errors.channel_invalid: Invalid channel name. Use @username or t.me/… link.
errors.channel_not_found: No channel with this name found.
errors.timeout: Telegram did not respond in time. Check internet or proxy settings.
errors.session_expired: Session expired. Click «Reset session» and sign in again.
errors.no_connection: No connection to Telegram. Check internet or proxy in Settings.
errors.network: No internet connection or Telegram unavailable. Check network and proxy.
errors.connect_server: Failed to connect to server. Check internet and proxy.

validation.date_invalid: Invalid date: {raw}. Use YYYY-MM-DD or DD.MM.YYYY
validation.api_missing:
Set API_ID and API_HASH in settings.
Get keys at: https://my.telegram.org/apps

errors.qr_timeout: Failed to show QR code window
errors.qr_image: Failed to generate QR code image
errors.channel_resolve: Channel «{name}» not found. Specify @username or a t.me/… link
errors.preview_channel_unknown: Could not determine channel for post {id}

crash.title: Crash ({date})
crash.abrupt: Process ended without normal task completion

prompt.title: Telegram sign-in required
prompt.heading: Saved session is invalid
prompt.default_error: Sign-in failed — enter phone number and code from Telegram.
prompt.hint: Code arrives in the «Telegram» chat inside the app. QR opens in a separate window.

qr.title: Sign in with QR code
qr.instructions:
Open Telegram on your phone:
Settings → Devices → Link Desktop Device
and scan this code.

viewer.title: Photo viewer
viewer.loading_with_thumb: Loading original from Telegram… (thumbnail shown for now; reopening will be instant)

date.placeholder_tip: Opens calendar — filter activates only after picking a date

crash.dump_found: Diagnostic dump from previous run found: {path}

worker.no_preview_posts: No posts with media for preview.

preview_flow.dialog_timeout: Preview dialog did not open in time
preview_flow.sequential_dialog_timeout: Step-by-step preview dialog did not open in time
preview_flow.parallel_thumbs: Parallel thumbnail loading while collecting cards…
preview_flow.cancelled_by_user: Preview cancelled by user ({n} media files collected)

download.parallel_workers: Parallel download: up to {n} concurrent downloads
download.file_error: Failed to save file for post {id}: {exc}
download.channel_flood: FloodWait getting channel for post {id}: wait {sec} sec.
download.channel_retry_failed: Failed to get channel for post {id}: {exc}
download.channel_failed: Failed to get channel for post {id}: {exc}
download.album_redownload: Album top-up: {on_disk} of {total} slots on disk — post {id}

search.channel_flood: FloodWait during channel search: wait {sec} sec.
search.date_boundary: Lower date boundary reached — search complete.

integrity.channel_not_found: Could not find channel «{key}» for top-up
integrity.channel_mode: Mode: searching #{tag} INSIDE channel «{title}» (@{filter}) — not global Telegram
integrity.global_search: Global search #{tag} across all public Telegram channels…

preview.albums_fetched: Fetched {n} albums for preview (in place, before showing cards)
preview.preview_flood: FloodWait during preview post {id}: wait {sec} sec.
preview.pool_shutdown_failed: Failed to shut down preview pool cleanly: {exc}

auth_telegram.dc_pick: Telegram requests DC{dc} — picking working server…
auth_telegram.qr_waiting: QR code shown, waiting for scan…

crash_dump.stale_heartbeat: Incomplete previous run detected, dump written: {path}
crash_dump.write_failed_thread: Failed to write crash dump from thread

cli.no_env: No .env file found. Create it via GUI.
cli.done: Done. Posts with media: {posts}, files: {files}, skipped: {skipped}
cli.need_gui_login: Sign in to Telegram via the GUI first (Sign in or QR).
cli.need_hashtag: Specify a hashtag: python main.py --cli --hashtag NAME
cli.description: Global hashtag search in Telegram and media download.
cli.help_cli: Run in console instead of GUI

dl_utils.hash_skip_large: Skipping hash dedup for large file ({mb} MB): {name}
